title: Boom for Real: The Late Teenage Years of Jean-Michel Basquiat
original_title: Boom for Real: The Late Teenage Years of Jean-Michel Basquiat
overview: Exploring the pre-fame years of the celebrated American artist Jean-Michel Basquiat, and how New York City, its people, and tectonically shifting arts culture of the late 1970s and '80s shaped his vision.
